properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v7 v8 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I want You more than my comfort I want You more than my needs Holy Spirit, You are so precious to me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I want You more than success I want You more than my dreams Holy Spirit, You are so precious to me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You make Your home here in my heart Here in my praises, as I lift You up This is my home, here in Your house Here in Your presence as I lift You up

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Holy, holy, holy is the Lord Be lifted up, be lifted up, exalted over all

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I want You whatever it costs me I want You, You're all that I seek Holy Spirit, You are so precious to me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Holy, holy, holy is the Lord Be lifted up, be lifted up, exalted over all Holy, holy, holy is the Lord Be lifted up, be lifted up, exalted over all

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: We value, we honour Your presence, Your power Inhabit the praise of Your people oh Holy One We value, we honour Your presence, Your power Inhabit the praise of Your people oh Holy One

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Holy, holy, holy is the Lord Be lifted up, be lifted up, exalted over all Be lifted up, be lifted up, exalted over all Be lifted up, be lifted up, exalted over all
